turns.speaker: S1
turns.text: Hi, is this seat taken? I'm Sam.

turns.speaker: S2
turns.text: Oh, go for it. Alex. You here for the hackathon or the talks?

turns.speaker: S1
turns.text: The hackathon. I've done eleven of these. I usually do the backend, sometimes the whole stack. Last one I built a scheduling tool, the one before that a chatbot, the one before that a thing for parsing PDFs, which was actually harder than it sounds because the layouts are inconsistent and...

turns.speaker: S2
turns.text: Ha, nice. So a lot of experience then.

turns.speaker: S1
turns.text: Yeah. I should say, I'm autistic, so I might come across as a bit blunt.

turns.speaker: S1
turns.text: What's the async-invoke endpoint's polling interval, do you know?

turns.speaker: S2
turns.text: Uh, not off the top of my head. I might grab a coffee actually, good luck with it.

visual_signals.observation: partner (S2) turned toward the speaker, relaxed posture, steady eye contact
partner's smile fading, glancing out toward the room
partner leaned back slightly and broke eye contact
partner shifted weight, angled away, half-standing
